body.title: CLOSED: ADC MCP tools: file_read / file_write — filesystem access from any device
body.result: file_read/file_write MCP tools, append mode, mkdir, 5 tests
body.description:
No file I/O tools exist in ADC. Reading source code, writing reports, workspace organization — all blocked. Postgres for state; filesystem for everything else (source, configs, workspace). This machine is dedicated to the Igor project.

Proposed shape: Add `file_read(path)` → {content, size_bytes, path, encoding} and `file_write(path, content, mode='w', mkdir=False)` → {written_bytes, path} to Librarian tools. Uses pathlib. file_write with mkdir=True creates parent directories. Logs both to action_log. Protection: machine-level, no path whitelist.

**Affected files:** new `agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/tools/file_tools.py`, update `agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/tools/__init__.py`
**Design rules:** no-TheIgors-imports; action-log-every-call
**Scope boundary:** file_read and file_write only. No rename/move/delete/list — use shell_exec for those.
**Test plan:** file_write to /tmp/adc_test.txt; file_read back, content matches; action_log has two entries; file_write with mkdir=True creates parent dir.
